module-1-terminal-map-project.label: Pwojè: kat tèminal
module-1-terminal-map-project.summary: Trase yon ti kat katab pou yon pwojè nòt teren avèk ls, cd, ak pwd pou wè kote ou ye epi deplase ant katab yo.

sketch0.title: Rezime pwojè kat tèminal pou nòt teren

project.title: Pwojè kat tèminal pou nòt teren

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Antre nan katab pwojè a
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: Ou se helping a park survey team trace an existing tèminal map. Kouri ls, deplase into park-tèminal-map, ak use pwd pou konfime ou reached the project katab.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kimilatif. Kòmanse ak espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman yo mande a.

help.concept: Project etaps se connected. Focus on where ou are, what katabs ou can see, ak where pou deplase next.
help.hint_1: Start avèk ls so ou can see the katab ou need pou enter.
help.hint_2: After ou cd into the project katab, run pwd pou konfime ou kote.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou etap pwojè Linux sa a.

0.message: List the espas travay first avèk ls.
Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

park_terminal_map_maps_current_location_.content: Current kote tchekeed avèk pwd ak ls

park_terminal_map_handoff_terminal_map_r.content: Terminal map ready for the park survey team

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Jwenn katab requests la
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: From inside park-tèminal-map, lis what se there, deplase into requests, ak use pwd pou konfime ou found the request notes.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kimilatif. Kòmanse ak espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman yo mande a.

help.concept: Once ou se inside a katab, ls montres what se available ak cd deplases ou deeper into the map.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak ls inside park-tèminal-map anvan choosing where pou go next.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwd apre cd requests so ou can verify the katab name.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou etap pwojè Linux sa a.

0.message: Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

park_terminal_map_maps_current_location_.content: Current kote tchekeed avèk pwd ak ls

park_terminal_map_handoff_terminal_map_r.content: Terminal map ready for the park survey team

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.title: Deplase soti nan requests pou ale nan maps
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.prompt: From requests, deplase back pou park-tèminal-map, enter maps, ak use pwd pou konfime ou reached the navigation notes.
module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kimilatif. Kòmanse ak espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman yo mande a.

help.concept: cd .. deplases ou up one level, which se useful when ou need pou deplase depi one sibling katab pou another.
help.hint_1: Leave requests avèk cd .. anvan trying pou enter maps.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak pwd at the end so ou can konfime that maps se ou katab aktyèl la.

module-1-terminal-map-project-terminal-t.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou etap pwojè Linux sa a.

0.message: Move back up one level first avèk cd ..
Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

park_terminal_map_maps_current_location_.content: Current kote tchekeed avèk pwd ak ls

park_terminal_map_handoff_terminal_map_r.content: Terminal map ready for the park survey team

project-synopsis.title: Rezime pwojè kat tèminal pou nòt teren
project-synopsis.bodyMarkdown: Ou se helping a park operations team trace an existing katab map anvan a volunteer event. In this project, ou will use `ls` pou see what se available, `cd` pou deplase between katabs, ak `pwd` pou konfime ou kote. Each etap builds on the previous espas travay, so focus on finding the right place instead of kreye new fichyes.
